spec.reasoning: Rule 6 prevents renaming any columns since 'ID', 'Comments', 'Parameter', and 'Found' all appear as common English words in the instruction body. Instead, I rename the sheet from 'Munka1' to 'Adatlap1' (both are Hungarian terms at the same descriptiveness level — 'Munka1' means 'Work1', 'Adatlap1' means 'Datasheet1'). I also insert a distractor column 'Remark' after column B (Comments), which is plausibly similar to Comments but clearly different. This shifts the positional layout of columns E/F/G rightward, testing whether the agent uses column names vs hardcoded positions. No data values need renaming since no columns were renamed.
